nasb.text: “Others have been with those who rebel against the light; They do not want to know its ways Nor abide in its paths.

esv.text: “There are those who rebel against the light, who are not acquainted with its ways, and do not stay in its paths.

cnv.text: 又有人與光為敵， 不認識光明的道， 不留在光明的路中。

ccb.text: “有人与光明为敌， 不认识光明之道， 也不走光明之路。
